news_items.headline: Remarkable facts and figures about Ohtani's 300th home run
Bluebird Banter 2026 MLB Draft Preview Part 1
news_items.summary: The 2026 MLB draft kicks off this Saturday, at 1:00pm ET. Because of MLB’s ironclad commitment to preventing this from becoming an event, it will occur while several teams are playing actual MLB games, although the Jays specifically will be in San Diego and don’t go until 8:40pm. The first 10 picks, which will inexplicably […]

news_items.headline: Yankees make history, strike out 17 times again
news_items.summary: In a 6-4 loss to the Rays on Tuesday night, the Yankees whiffed 17 times to become the first team in American League history to hit that mark in consecutive nine-inning games.

news_items.headline: O'Hearn drives in 10, breaking Pirates' record
news_items.summary: Pittsburgh Pirates first baseman Ryan O'Hearn, in his first season with the franchise, made history Tuesday night, setting a club record by driving in 10 runs on three home runs in a convincing 12-4 victory over the Atlanta Braves at PNC Park.

news_items.headline: 'Pisses me off': Wheeler wins after All-Star snub
news_items.summary: On a day when Major League Baseball unveiled a list of All-Star replacements that did not include Zack Wheeler, the annoyed 36-year-old righty tied a career high with 14 strikeouts, as the Philadelphia Phillies defeated the Cincinnati Reds 4-1 on Tuesday.

news_items.headline: Royals' Tolbert (12 ABs, 12 hits) ties MLB record
news_items.summary: Tyler Tolbert of the Royals tied a major league record with hits in 12 consecutive plate appearances, reaching the mark with an infield single in a 16-12 win over the Mets on Tuesday night.

news_items.headline: Ohtani shrugs off arm issue, to make Friday start
news_items.summary: Shohei Ohtani reached the 300-homer milestone Tuesday night against the Rockies and is in line to make his last pitching start before the All-Star break on Friday.

news_items.headline: Goodman scratched before Rockies take on Dodgers
news_items.summary: Colorado Rockies All-Star Hunter Goodman, originally slotted to be the designated hitter, was scratched on Tuesday night, and missed his club's 4-3 victory over the Los Angeles Dodgers, a day after he suffered a left hand contusion in an 11-inning loss.

news_items.headline: 3B coach Cora leaves Tigers during third season
news_items.summary: Detroit Tigers third base coach Joey Cora, the older brother of former Boston Red Sox manager Alex Cora, has left the club in the middle of his third season on the job because of what manager A.J. Hinch described on Tuesday as "philosophical differences."

news_items.headline: ⚾ Breaking down the MLB Home Run Derby field
news_items.summary: The sluggers who will be swinging for the fences in Philly are being named. Here's how they match up.

news_items.summary: Justin Wrobleski strikes out nine over seven innings, bullpen lets lead slip in 4-3 loss to Rockies.

news_items.headline: Mets' A.J. Ewing records first career four-hit game as rookie becomes more comfortable at plate
news_items.summary: Mets rookie outfielder A.J. Ewing credited his best offensive day as a major leaguer to becoming more comfortable at the plate and explained why his skillset works well for batting leadoff.
